Appearances: Michael Dobrov appeared by zoom for Angela Wills (administrator).
John Boessenecker appeared by zoom for W.C. Cox & Company (assignee).

Mr. Dobrov stated that he anticipates getting signed waivers from Valerie Robinson and Rachel Robinson, that they are working on that, and that he is working with Mr. Boessenecker to gather financial information for his clients. The court raised the issue of filing a 11700 petition to confirm entitlement to distribution. Mr. Dobrov stated that there is no dispute that they are rightful heirs, that everyone in the family concurs that they are rightful heirs, and that there are two ways to do that, by 11700 or final distribution. Mr. Boessenecker stated that they don't have any heirship dispute, and that it can be determined by final distribution. The court noted the inventory and appraisal indicates $2,000,000.00 in cash, and that the latest information indicates $1,000,000.00 in cash. Mr. Dobrov stated that he is not sure why, that taxes had to be paid and still have to be paid this year, and that he will have to get back to the examiner. Mr. Boessenecker stated that paragraph 16 of the amended petition shows $1,980,000.00. The Amended Petition for Order Approving Status Report, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant. A petition under Probate Code 11700 is to be filed by May 23, 2023. Status on filing of said petition is set for May 30, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Dobrov, via Zoom, for Angela Willis, Personal Representative.

Mr. Dobrov reports that the main asset in this matter is a retirement account and is causing a delay finalizing the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). The court advises counsel that it is expecting either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration and file either a partial or final I&A.

After additional discussion the matter is continued to Aug-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
